notes: Authorization required vs freely accessible — mutually exclusive
Must change vs must never change — direct contradiction
Dual approval required vs single approval allowed for any amount
Remote allowed Mon/Fri vs must be in office 5 days
Staging required vs hotfixes bypass staging
Communications are private vs company may monitor all communications
NDA required vs pre-approved vendors exempt from NDA
Delete within 30 days vs retain for 7 years — impossible to satisfy both
All incidents must be reported vs minor incidents may be resolved silently
All changes need two reviewers vs hotfixes may skip review
Over $500 needs pre-approval vs up to $2000 allowed without pre-approval
Daily offsite backups required vs weekly local backups only
Security review required vs trusted libraries exempt — partial overlap but scoped exception
OAuth required externally vs API keys allowed internally — different scopes
Training within first week vs may defer 90 days during launch — time-bounded exception
Both are Data Privacy rules but address different aspects
Security rules in different domains — passwords vs API auth
Both Finance rules but cover different transaction types
